_doc: Codetective manual overrides for CODEOWNERS team slugs. Auto-fetched fields (team_name, slack channels, GH members) come from gh_teams.py + slack_channels.json. This file ONLY holds info no API can give us: on_call, escalation, docs. Empty entries are fine; the team simply won't show those fields. Add an entry when you know the on-call rotation, escalation contact, or canonical docs URL for a team.

@alpacahq/gobroker-db-reviewer._note: Review-only group, not a service owner.
